tools.name: url_pulse
tools.description: Check a public HTTP or HTTPS URL before expensive browsing or AI processing. Returns availability, redirects, content type, page metadata, language, cache state, content hash, robots policy, and access restrictions. Does not execute JavaScript.

tools.name: url_passport
tools.description: Inspect a public HTTP or HTTPS URL and return a structured site passport. Includes pulse fields, registrable domain, robots and sitemap discovery, feeds, OpenAPI hints, and page metadata. Uses at most eight external HTTP requests and does not execute JavaScript.

tools.name: url_extract
tools.description: Extract normalized main text and optional links from a public HTTP or HTTPS document. Returns title, author, publication time, language, content hash, truncation and cache state. Output size and fetch time are bounded; JavaScript is not executed.

tools.name: url_changed
tools.description: Compare a public HTTP or HTTPS URL with its previously stored normalized content hash. Creates a baseline on first use, then reports whether content changed and returns current and previous hashes with timestamps. JavaScript is not executed.
